title: Earthy Crumbly Vietnamese Beef Kidney Stew
description: A comforting and earthy Vietnamese dish featuring beef kidney, whisked with Mediterranean-friendly flavors. This stew is perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef kidney and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the kidney from the pot and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar, and stir to combine.
Add the cooked beef kidney back into the pot, along with the star anise and black pepper.
Pour in 2 cups of beef broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the kidney is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions.
